site.title: Anthony Gullion - Freelance front-end Developer
site.description: I'm a developer Edmonton, passionate about user experience and specializing in making tech more accessible. My primary tools of choice include: JavaScript, React, C#, SQL, and Node.js.

intro.name: Anthony Gullion
intro.summary: a software developer with strong focus on making technology as simple as possible, so it is accessible to all.

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Anthony, a front-end software developer from Italy.
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools of choice includes:
about.passion: Beyond coding, I'm passionate about games, driving, and spending time with those close to me. An unusual hobby of mine is beadwork, I don't have much time for it nowadays but I really enjoy beading earrings.
about.approach: While I have some preferred tools, I always choose the best one for the job, even if it's not on my usual list. My goal is to find the right solution for each project.
